== Notes for [[Item:Q103530|Q103530]] ==

https://www.jstor.org/stable/3115541?read-now=1&seq=9#page_scan_tab_contents (page 375) says Luis de Castro was son of Juan de Castro de Londres, cousin of Juan de Castro, son of Diego de Castro

https://books.google.se/books?id=x2_qAAAAMAAJ&dq=Luis+de+Castro+Juan+de+Castro+Ines+de+Lerma&focus=searchwithinvolume&q=Luis+

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000081180682438

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
